task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the London Array offshore wind farm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view shows an offshore wind farm (grid of white turbine dots/structures in the water) near coordinates 51.64°N, 1.55°E.

task_completion.description: Three placemarks named 'Turbine 1', 'Turbine 2', and 'Turbine 3' are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Yellow pushpins or similar placemark icons labeled 'Turbine 1', 'Turbine 2', and 'Turbine 3' are visible on the map or in the 'Places' sidebar.

task_completion.description: Placemarks are positioned on three consecutive turbines in a row.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The placemarks are located directly on top of visible turbine structures, arranged in a straight line on adjacent turbines.

task_completion.description: A measurement line is drawn between Turbine 1 and Turbine 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line (often yellow or red) connects the placemark for Turbine 1 to the placemark for Turbine 2.

task_completion.description: The measured distance is within the expected range for this wind farm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement tool window or overlay displays a distance between 650 meters and 1,200 meters (or 0.65 km - 1.20 km).

integrity.description: The agent is interacting with a 3D globe application (e.g., Google Earth) and not a static image viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface includes standard GIS/globe controls (compass, layers, toolbar) and is not a screenshot opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: The measurement is generated by the application's tool, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance is shown in a system 'Ruler' or 'Measure' dialog box, not typed into a text document, search bar, or placemark label.

integrity.description: The agent performs the measurement visually rather than looking up the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not have a browser tab open searching for 'London Array turbine spacing' or similar text queries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The London Array wind farm is located at approximately 51.6439°N, 1.5536°E. The turbines are arranged in a grid pattern offshore. The physical spacing between adjacent turbines in this specific farm is between 650 meters and 1,200 meters.
